 {"id":"bd-1yi5","title":"Use -short flag in CI for PR checks","description":"Update CI configuration to use -short flag for PR checks, run full tests nightly.

The slow tests already support testing.Short() and will be skipped.

Expected savings: ~20 seconds for PR checks (fast tests only)

Implementation:
- Update .github/workflows/ci.yml to add -short flag for PR tests
- Create/update nightly workflow for full test runs
- Update README/docs about test strategy

 {"id":"bd-22e0bde9","title":"Add TestNWayCollision for 5+ clones","description":"**Summary:** Extended collision resolution testing from 3 to 5+ clones to validate synchronization algorithm scalability. - Created flexible testNCloneCollision function
- Added test scenarios with varied sync orders
- Implemented performance benchmarks
